---
title: "Climatology"
subtitle: "The science of climate systems, atmospheric processes, and global weather patterns."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---



Welcome to the **Climatology** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course explores the Earth's atmosphere, climate systems, and the physical processes that drive weather and climate variability at local, regional, and global scales.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Composition and Structure of Atmosphere; Insolation, Heat Budget of Earth.**
* **Temperature, Pressure and Winds, Atmospheric Circulation (air-masses, fronts and upper air circulation, cyclones and anticyclones).**
* **Climatic Classification of Koppen & Thornthwaite.**
* **ENSO Events (El Nino, La Nina and Southern Oscillations).**
* **Meteorological Hazards and Disasters (Cyclones, Thunderstorms, Tornadoes, Hailstorms, Heat and Cold waves, Drought and Cloudburst, GLOF).**
* **Climate Change: Evidences and Causes of Climatic Change in the past, Human impact on Global Climate.**

---

{{< include climatology/composition-and-structure-of-the-atmosphere.md >}}

{{< include climatology/insolation-and-heat-budget-of-the-earth.md >}}

{{< include climatology/distribution-of-temperature.md >}}

{{< include climatology/atmospheric-pressure-and-general-circulation-of-winds.md >}}

{{< include climatology/monsoons-and-jet-streams.md >}}

{{< include climatology/stability-and-instability-of-the-atmosphere.md >}}

{{< include climatology/air-masses-and-fronts.md >}}

{{< include climatology/temperate-and-tropical-cyclones.md >}}

{{< include climatology/types-and-distribution-of-precipitation.md >}}

{{< include climatology/köppens-scheme.md >}}

{{< include climatology/thornthwaites-scheme.md >}}

{{< include climatology/hydrological-cycle.md >}}

{{< include climatology/global-warming.md >}}

{{< include climatology/temperature-and-pressure-belts-of-the-world.md >}}

{{< include climatology/heat-budget-of-the-earth.md >}}

{{< include climatology/atmospheric-circulation.md >}}

{{< include climatology/atmospheric-stability-and-instability.md >}}

{{< include climatology/planetary-and-local-winds.md >}}

{{< include climatology/air-masses-and-fronto.md >}}

{{< include climatology/weather-and-climate.md >}}

{{< include climatology/koppens-thornthwaites-and-trewar-thas-classification-of-world-climate.md >}}

{{< include climatology/global-climatic-change-and-role-and-response-of-man-in-climatic-changes.md >}}

{{< include climatology/applied-climatology-and-urban-climate.md >}}
